# Klaro

> Arc-native USDC invoicing + Stenn-Proof receipts + INR cashout. Vendors anywhere
> get paid in USDC, settle in seconds on Arc Layer-1, build on-chain financial
> reputation. Built for the Circle Developer Grant + Arc Builders Fund.

## Status

Testnet preview. No real money moves. Live mainnet target post-M12 + Circle grant.

## Primary surfaces

- [Landing](https://www.myklaro.app/) — product overview, 17 sections, brand kit, footer
- [Vendor dashboard](https://www.myklaro.app/vendor) — sign in → 6 balance states → invoices
- [Hosted invoice](https://www.myklaro.app/i/[id]) — buyer-facing checkout, USDC pay-with EIP-712
- [Public receipt](https://www.myklaro.app/receipt/[hash]) — anyone-verifiable Stenn-Proof anchor
- [Cashout](https://www.myklaro.app/vendor/cashout) — vendor USDC → local currency (INR pilot live)
- [Disputes](https://www.myklaro.app/vendor/disputes) — open + evidence + 5 outcomes
- [Retainer](https://www.myklaro.app/vendor/retainer) — Sablier-style per-second streaming
- [Financing readiness](https://www.myklaro.app/vendor/financing) — read-only score (NOT a loan offer)
- [LP portal](https://www.myklaro.app/lp) — invite-only liquidity-provider onboarding (8 screens)
- [Admin](https://www.myklaro.app/admin/disputes) — operator queue, 5 decision routes

## Key primitives

- Arc Layer-1 (chain id 5042002) — USDC as gas, sub-second deterministic finality
- USDC ERC-20 interface (6-dec) at 0x3600...
- Circle CCTP V2 + Gateway for cross-chain USDC
- App Kit Swap (Arc Testnet only — USDC/EURC/cirBTC)
- Modular Wallets (passkey ERC-4337 + ERC-6900) for vendors
- Developer-Controlled Wallets for Klaro operator
- 15 deployed contracts: KlaroConfig, InvoiceEscrow, AuditReceipt, RefundProtocol,
  FeeSplitter, RoutePolicyEngine, LPRegistry, LPStaking, ProofRegistry,
  CashoutOrderProcessor, MultiChainRouter, DisputeManager, RetainerStream,
  ReasonCodes lib + Deploy script

## Honest labels (principle 8 — no overclaiming)

- "live testnet" — works end-to-end on Arc testnet today
- "simulated" — UI + mock store; no chain calls
- "access-gated" — needs partner/Circle approval (StableFX, MoonPay sandbox)
- "lab preview" — research-grade, not production
- "partner-pending" — adapter exists, partner not signed
- "mainnet-only" — never on testnet
- "not-in-testnet" — explicitly outside scope

## Disclaimers

- Klaro is not a bank
- Financing readiness is NOT a loan offer
- No PII on-chain (principle 11)
- Real INR fiat movement is mainnet-only (testnet uses simulated proof per v2 §23)
- Klaro does not hold lending capital — partners do
